chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-7444 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge 03-02-2025. Mr. Altamash Arab Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Dhani Bux Lashari, Advocate for the Respondent/SBCA Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Report filed on behalf of SBCA is taken on record. Learned counsel for the SBCA states that the subject residential property is clearly being used for illegal commercial purposes of a school, hence, is being sealed. It is also stated that the said property has consistently been utilized for such illegal purposes despite interventions of the Court and regulatory authorities in the past. Despite orders dated 02.10.2023 and 20.01.2025, the private respondent nos. 3 and 14 have opted not to appear. The respective learned counsel jointly state that this petition squarely covered by the ratio of a Division Bench ore\der of this court in the Headstart School case1, therefore, in mutatis mutandis application of the reasoning and rationale thereof it is just and proper that this petition to be allowed in terms of prayer clauses A(i), C(i)&(ii). Order accordingly. Petition is allowed in the aforesaid terms along with listed applications. Judge Judge Amjad PS 1 Nauman Qasim Paracha & Others vs. SBCA & Others (CPD 133 of 2022) and connected matters; order dated 15.01.2025.
